panels.title: Adoption Rate
panels.description:
Claude Code users as % of developer headcount (set via variable).
Maturity: <20% Experimentation, 20-50% Early Adoption, 50-75% Integration, 75%+ Optimization

targets.expr: count(count by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))) / $developer_headcount * 100

panels.title: Active Users
panels.description: Unique users with sessions in selected time range

targets.expr: count(count by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})))

panels.title: Dev Headcount
panels.description: Developer headcount (set via dashboard variable)

targets.expr: $developer_headcount

panels.title: Commits
panels.description: Total git commits made during Claude Code sessions

targets.expr: sum(max_over_time(claude_code_commit_count_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))

panels.title: Total Sessions
panels.description: Total Claude Code sessions started

targets.expr: count(count by (session_id) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})))

panels.title: Avg Sessions / User
panels.description: Average number of sessions per active user

targets.expr: count(count by (session_id) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))) / count(count by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})))

panels.title: Lines Added
panels.description: Total lines of code added during Claude Code sessions

targets.expr: sum(max_over_time(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total{type="added"}[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))

panels.title: Edit Acceptance Rate
panels.description: % of code edit tool decisions accepted — analogous to Copilot's suggestion acceptance rate

targets.expr: sum(max_over_time(claude_code_code_edit_tool_decision_total{decision="accept"}[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})) / sum(max_over_time(claude_code_code_edit_tool_decision_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})) * 100

panels.title: Claude Code Versions
panels.description: Distribution of Claude Code versions across sessions

targets.expr: count by (service_version) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))

panels.title: Platform Distribution
panels.description: OS and terminal types across the org

targets.expr: count by (os_type) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))

panels.title: Adoption Over Time
panels.description: Active, returning, and new users over time

targets.expr: count(count by (user_email) (increase(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total[$__rate_interval]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})))

count(count by (user_email) (increase(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total[$__rate_interval]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})) and count by (user_email) (increase(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total[$__rate_interval] offset 7d) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})))

count(count by (user_email) (increase(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total[$__rate_interval]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})) unless count by (user_email) (increase(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total[$__rate_interval] offset 7d) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})))

panels.title: Lines of Code Modified
panels.description: Lines added vs removed — shows volume of AI-assisted code changes

targets.expr: sum by (type) (rate(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total[$__rate_interval]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))

panels.title: Top Users by Cost
panels.description: Highest-spending Claude Code users in selected time range

targets.expr:
topk(10,
  sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]))
  * on(user_email) group_left(display_name)
  topk by (user_email) (1, max by (user_email, display_name) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))
)

panels.title: Top Job Titles by Cost
panels.description: Total Claude Code spend grouped by job title

targets.expr:
sort_desc(sum by (job_title) (
  sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]))
  * on(user_email) group_left(job_title)
  topk by (user_email) (1, max by (user_email, job_title) (user_info{job_title!="", rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))
))

panels.title: Total Spend
panels.description: Aggregate cost across all users and models

targets.expr: sum(max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))

panels.title: Cost / User
panels.description: Average cost per active user

targets.expr: sum(max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})) / count(count by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})))

panels.title: Cost / Session
panels.description: Average cost per session

targets.expr: sum(max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})) / count(count by (session_id) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})))

panels.title: Cost / Commit
panels.description: Average cost per git commit — key ROI efficiency metric

targets.expr: sum(max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})) / sum(max_over_time(claude_code_commit_count_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))

panels.title: Tool Usage
panels.description: Which tools developers invoke most — Read/Grep = exploration, Edit/Write/Bash = production work

targets.expr: sort_desc(sum by (tool_name) (max_over_time(claude_code_tool_calls_total[$__range]) and on(session_id) max by (session_id) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))))

panels.title: Cost by Model (over time)
panels.description: Spend breakdown by model tier — the main cost optimization lever

targets.expr: sum by (model) (rate(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__rate_interval]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))

panels.title: Model Mix (by cost)
panels.description: Which models are consuming the budget

targets.expr: sum by (model) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))

panels.title: Spend by Department
panels.description: Cost distribution across organizational departments (requires graph-enrichment exporter)

targets.expr:
sum by (department) (
  sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]))
  * on(user_email) group_left(department)
  topk by (user_email) (1, max by (user_email, department) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))
)

panels.title: Active Users by Department
panels.description: User adoption across organizational departments

targets.expr:
count by (department) (
  group by (user_email, department) (
    max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range])
    * on(user_email) group_left(department)
    topk by (user_email) (1, max by (user_email, department) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))
  )
)

panels.title: Active Users by Rollup Manager
panels.description: Count of active Claude Code users grouped by rollup manager (CxO direct report)

targets.expr: sort_desc(count by (rollup_name) (group by (user_email, rollup_name) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]) * on(user_email) group_left(rollup_name) topk by (user_email) (1, max by (user_email, rollup_name) (user_info{rollup_name!="", rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})))))

panels.title: Spend by Rollup Manager
panels.description: Total Claude Code spend rolled up to CxO direct reports

targets.expr: sort_desc(sum by (rollup_name) (sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(rollup_name) topk by (user_email) (1, max by (user_email, rollup_name) (user_info{rollup_name!="", rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))))

panels.title: Usage by Job Title
panels.description: Total active time grouped by job title — shows which roles are adopting

targets.expr: sort_desc(sum by (job_title) (sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(job_title) topk by (user_email) (1, max by (user_email, job_title) (user_info{job_title!="", rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))))

panels.title: Developer Scorecard
panels.description: Complete view: org data + Claude Code usage + outcomes (commits, lines) + Jira output + Tempo hours

targets.expr:
sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]))
* on(user_email) group_left(display_name, department, job_title, manager_name, rollup_name)
topk by (user_email) (1, max by (user_email, display_name, department, job_title, manager_name, rollup_name) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))

sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total[$__range]))
* on(user_email) group_left()
topk by (user_email) (1, max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))

sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_commit_count_total[$__range])) and on(user_email) count by (user_email) (user_info{display_name!="", rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})

sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total{type="added"}[$__range])) and on(user_email) count by (user_email) (user_info{display_name!="", rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})

sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(jira_issues_resolved_total[$__range])) and on(user_email) count by (user_email) (user_info{display_name!="", rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})

sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(jira_story_points_resolved_total[$__range])) and on(user_email) count by (user_email) (user_info{display_name!="", rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})

sum by (user_email) (tempo_time_logged_by_user_seconds) / 3600 and on(user_email) count by (user_email) (user_info{display_name!="", rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})

(
  sum by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total[$__range]))
  / sum by (user_email) (tempo_time_logged_by_user_seconds)
  * 100
) and on(user_email) count by (user_email) (max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range]))
and on(user_email) max by (user_email) (user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})

panels.title: Org Hierarchy Tree
panels.description: Interactive org tree showing rollup manager → manager → user hierarchy with aggregate metrics

targets.expr: org_tree_node

sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (rollup_email)(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(rollup_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, rollup_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))), "node_id", "$1", "rollup_email", "(.*)"))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (manager_email)(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(manager_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, manager_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))), "node_id", "$1", "manager_email", "(.*)") * on(node_id) group_left() max by (node_id)(org_tree_node))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left() topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})), "node_id", "$1", "user_email", "(.*)"))

sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (rollup_email)(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(rollup_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, rollup_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))), "node_id", "$1", "rollup_email", "(.*)"))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (manager_email)(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(manager_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, manager_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))), "node_id", "$1", "manager_email", "(.*)") * on(node_id) group_left() max by (node_id)(org_tree_node))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left() topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})), "node_id", "$1", "user_email", "(.*)"))

sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (rollup_email)(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(claude_code_commit_count_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(rollup_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, rollup_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))), "node_id", "$1", "rollup_email", "(.*)"))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (manager_email)(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(claude_code_commit_count_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(manager_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, manager_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))), "node_id", "$1", "manager_email", "(.*)") * on(node_id) group_left() max by (node_id)(org_tree_node))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(claude_code_commit_count_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left() topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})), "node_id", "$1", "user_email", "(.*)"))

sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (rollup_email)(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total{type="added"}[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(rollup_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, rollup_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))), "node_id", "$1", "rollup_email", "(.*)"))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (manager_email)(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total{type="added"}[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(manager_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, manager_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))), "node_id", "$1", "manager_email", "(.*)") * on(node_id) group_left() max by (node_id)(org_tree_node))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total{type="added"}[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left() topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})), "node_id", "$1", "user_email", "(.*)"))

sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (rollup_email)(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(jira_issues_resolved_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(rollup_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, rollup_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))), "node_id", "$1", "rollup_email", "(.*)"))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (manager_email)(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(jira_issues_resolved_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(manager_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, manager_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))), "node_id", "$1", "manager_email", "(.*)") * on(node_id) group_left() max by (node_id)(org_tree_node))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(jira_issues_resolved_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left() topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})), "node_id", "$1", "user_email", "(.*)"))

sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (rollup_email)(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(jira_story_points_resolved_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(rollup_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, rollup_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))), "node_id", "$1", "rollup_email", "(.*)"))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (manager_email)(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(jira_story_points_resolved_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left(manager_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, manager_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))), "node_id", "$1", "manager_email", "(.*)") * on(node_id) group_left() max by (node_id)(org_tree_node))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (user_email)(max_over_time(jira_story_points_resolved_total[$__range])) * on(user_email) group_left() topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})), "node_id", "$1", "user_email", "(.*)"))

sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (rollup_email)(sum by (user_email)(tempo_time_logged_by_user_seconds) * on(user_email) group_left(rollup_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, rollup_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))) / 3600, "node_id", "$1", "rollup_email", "(.*)"))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (manager_email)(sum by (user_email)(tempo_time_logged_by_user_seconds) * on(user_email) group_left(manager_email) topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email, manager_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"}))) / 3600, "node_id", "$1", "manager_email", "(.*)") * on(node_id) group_left() max by (node_id)(org_tree_node))
or
sum by (node_id)(label_replace(sum by (user_email)(tempo_time_logged_by_user_seconds) / 3600 * on(user_email) group_left() topk by (user_email)(1, max by (user_email)(user_info{rollup_name=~"$rollup_name", manager_name=~"$manager_name", user_email=~"$user_email"})), "node_id", "$1", "user_email", "(.*)"))

options.additionalColumns: Value #Cost,Value #Active Time,Value #Commits,Value #Lines Added,Value #Issues Resolved,Value #Story Points,Value #Tempo Hours

panels.title: Sessions Per Day
panels.description: Daily session count — shows adoption trend

targets.expr: count(max_over_time(claude_code_session_count_total{user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__interval]))

panels.title: Active Time Per Day
panels.description: Daily active time — shows investment trend

targets.expr: sum(increase(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total{user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Cost Per Session Trend
panels.description: $/session over time — the key efficiency metric. Declining = user getting more efficient.

targets.expr:
sum(increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__interval]))
/
count(max_over_time(claude_code_session_count_total{user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__interval]))

panels.title: Lines Per Dollar
panels.description: Rising trend = more output per dollar spent

targets.expr:
sum(increase(claude_code_lines_of_code_count_total{type="added", user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__rate_interval]))
/
sum(increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: User Prompts Over Time
panels.description: Prompt rate over time (session join)

targets.expr:
sum(
  increase(claude_code_user_prompts_total[$__interval])
  and on(session_id)
  max_over_time(claude_code_session_count_total{user_email=~"$user_email"}[$__interval])
)

panels.title: Token Usage by Type
panels.description: Input, output, cache read, and cache creation tokens over time

targets.expr: sum by (type) (rate(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Token Usage by Model
panels.description: Total token consumption split by model

targets.expr: sum by (model) (rate(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: API Latency by Model
panels.description: Request duration — spikes here mean bad developer experience

targets.expr: sum by (model) (rate(claude_code_request_duration_ms[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio
panels.description: cacheRead / (cacheRead + input) — higher = better prompt reuse across the org

targets.expr: sum(max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) / (sum(max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="cacheRead"}[$__range])) + sum(max_over_time(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{type="input"}[$__range]))) * 100

list.description: Number of developers in your engineering team (for adoption rate calculation)
list.label: Developer Headcount
list.name: developer_headcount
